title: digitalis lutea var. minor
intro: Digitalis lutea var. minor, also known as minor foxglove, is a plant that belongs to the foxglove family (Plantaginaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its cardiotonic and diuretic effects, which can help to strengthen the heart and reduce fluid retention. The health benefits of Digitalis lutea var. minor include its ability to improve heart function, lower blood pressure, and reduce symptoms of heart failure, making it a valuable herbal remedy for cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
